headline: Assessing Stryker (SYK) Valuation After Mixed Q1 Results And Cyberattack Concerns
summary: Stryker (SYK) is back in focus after mixed first quarter results, a disruptive cyberattack, and a series of analyst updates, even as the company rolls out new products and reorganizes parts of its business. See our latest analysis for Stryker. At a share price of US$307.63, Stryker’s short term share price return has been weak, with the stock down 20.6% over the past 90 days. The 5 year total shareholder return of 29.73% points to longer term gains and suggests recent momentum has faded as...
